title: Security Scanner
description: A web app that scans Dockerfiles, Kubernetes manifests, and IaC files using industry-standard tools. Returns a scored security report with plain-English explanations for each finding.

title: DevOps Playground
description: A live autoscale visualizer that fires real HTTP load at a target and displays real-time pod count, CPU usage, requests/sec, and Kubernetes events on a live React dashboard.
